name: airlock
description: Layered prompt-injection / agent-security guard. Ingress scan of WebFetch/WebSearch content (invisible-Unicode 'ASCII smuggling' + heuristics + Prompt Guard 2), egress exfiltration gate (secrets/PII + Markdown-URL sinks), task-drift (AlignmentCheck), MCP supply-chain vetting, and a memory-write poisoning guard.
